# Documentation Improvement

## Summary

Briefly describe the proposed documentation improvement.

---

## Current Documentation

Specify the page(s) that require updates.

Example:

docs/computer-science/system-design.md

---

## Proposed Changes

Describe the improvements you'd like to see.

---

## Reason

Explain why this change would improve the documentation.

---

## References

Include links or references if applicable.

---

## Additional Notes
Provide any additional context.
